name: Employment Verification Agent
description: Simulates Equifax Workforce Solutions / The Work Number. Verifies employment status, tenure, and income from payroll records.

skills.name: Employment Status Verification
skills.description: Verifies whether the subject is currently employed and returns employer name and start date.

skills.name: Income Verification
skills.description: Returns verified annual income from payroll records and employment type.

skills.name: Employment History
skills.description: Returns tenure in years and employment type (full-time, part-time, contract, self-employed).
